findings.description: Signature image for David Miller includes surrounding text ('Sincerely,', 'David Miller, PE', 'State Mining Engineer'), which is also rendered as standalone HTML text, causing visible duplication of content.
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'Sincerely,' once followed by signature, then 'David Miller, PE / State Mining Engineer' once. HTML shows 'Sincerely,' as text, then an image containing 'Sincerely,' + signature + 'David Miller, PE' + 'State Mining Engineer', then again 'David Miller, PE' and 'State Mining Engineer' as text—tripling the typed elements.

findings.description: Signature images for Brian Wrenn and Brenda Harris include surrounding text that is also present as standalone HTML text, creating visible content duplication.
findings.evidence: PDF shows Brian Wrenn's signature once with typed name/title below. HTML shows a signature image containing partial surrounding text ('t and General Counsel, Department of Environ…', 'aleigh, NC 27699-1601.', 'Brian Wrenn, Director') plus the same name and title repeated as standalone text. Similarly, Brenda Harris's signature image includes '12-15-2020' and her name/title, which are also repeated as text.
